qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Pre-authentication RCE via config.php injection in the Installer controller
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes pre-authentication RCE via PHP code injection in the Installer controller (Core/Controller/Installer.php:257), where user input is written unsanitized into config.php. The advisory describes SQL Injection in the REST API ORDER BY clause via ModelClass::getOrderBy() and DbQuery::orderBy(). These are completely different vulnerabilities with different root causes, affected components, and attack vectors. The installer vulnerability is an installation-phase code injection, while the advisory vulnerability is an authenticated API SQL injection affecting query construction.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The qualifying finding 'installer-rce' does not identify the advisory-described SQL Injection vulnerability in the FacturaScripts REST API ORDER BY clause. The advisory describes authenticated SQL injection via the sort parameter in ModelClass::getOrderBy() and DbQuery::orderBy() (Core/Model/Base/ModelClass.php and Core/DbQuery.php). Finding 'installer-rce' describes a pre-authentication code injection vulnerability in the Installer controller that writes unsanitized input into config.php. This represents a different vulnerability class, different affected component, and different root cause than the advisory. The session discovered a real vulnerability but did not find the specific SQL Injection issue described in advisory GHSA-cjfx-qhwm-hf99.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-cjfx-qhwm-hf99: SQL Injection in REST API ORDER BY clause via ModelClass::getOrderBy() and DbQuery::orderBy(), requires authenticated API token (PR:L), affects sort parameter across API endpoints

Finding 'installer-rce': Pre-authentication PHP code injection in Installer controller at Core/Controller/Installer.php:257, writes unsanitized POST parameters into config.php, completely different vulnerability class and root cause
No finding references ModelClass::getOrderBy(), DbQuery::orderBy(), API sorting, or SQL injection in query construction
